description: Legal query, possibly a draft, in Judaeo-Arabic. There is text at multiple angles, including faint text underlying the text that can be seen on the older layer of the palimpsest. From the image it appears that the document is folded in a curious way and there may be more text discoverable underneath the folds. This composite fragment may have served as a masṭara (ruling board) based on the rows of puncture holes that are clearly visible on the verso (information from CUDL).
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
